# Murma

> Community demand-signaling platform. People request new services, opening hours, branches, or venues in their town and upvote what matters. Businesses and councils use the signals to make better decisions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Murma does and who it's for.
- [Explore](/explore): Browse live requests and businesses on a map of your area.
- [Privacy](/privacy): UK GDPR privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Cookies](/cookies): Cookie and tracking policy.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for posting and upvoting requests.
